metadata.description: 500 high-quality implicit temporal scope pairs (300 original debiased + 200 new). All pairs avoid explicit time words and use lexically balanced vocabulary.
metadata.validation: Pre-validated for lexical purity, structural balance, clear temporal distinction, and answer length

debiasing.method: Two-pass manual lexical neutralization — replaced side-exclusive vocabulary with diversified neutral synonyms, then corrected second-order biases introduced by synonym clustering
debiasing.note_on_expansion: The 200 new pairs (IDs 301-500) were written with debiasing constraints built in from the start, deliberately varying vocabulary to avoid side-exclusive word patterns.
